Platform & Data.narrative: This family ensures your fleet system is accessible, secure, and connected to your other business tools. Singapore SMEs must comply with PDPA data protection rules, and you need staff to access fleet data safely from the field or office. It matters when your driver needs to log a trip on their phone during a delivery, or when you're integrating fuel card data into your accounting system.

Vehicle Registry.narrative: This family keeps a single source of truth for every vehicle, insurance policy, and procurement decision in your fleet. For Singapore SMEs, accurate vehicle records are critical for road tax renewals, COE compliance, and insurance claims—mistakes can cost you fines or claim denials. It matters when you need to prove a vehicle's registration status to LTA, or when you're filing an insurance claim after an accident.

Driver & Safety.narrative: This family tracks who drives what, how safely they drive, and what incidents occur—protecting both your staff and your liability. Singapore SMEs face rising insurance premiums and accident costs; safety scoring helps you identify risky drivers and reduce claims. It matters when a harsh-braking alert flags a driver who needs retraining, or when you need incident details to support an insurance claim.

Maintenance & Workshop.narrative: This family prevents breakdowns by scheduling services before vehicles fail, and tracks every repair to control costs and downtime. For Singapore SMEs running tight delivery schedules, a breakdown can lose you a customer; preventive maintenance keeps vehicles on the road. It matters when you're due for a 40,000 km service and the system reminds you before the vehicle fails, or when you need to prove maintenance history for warranty claims.

Operations & Logistics.narrative: This family tracks where your vehicles are, how much fuel they use, and how efficiently they complete trips—the operational heartbeat of any fleet. Singapore SMEs competing on delivery speed and cost need real-time visibility and route optimisation to stay profitable. It matters when GPS tracking shows a driver is stuck in traffic and you reroute them to meet a deadline, or when fuel tracking reveals a vehicle consuming 20% more than expected.

Cost & Compliance.narrative: This family aggregates fleet costs and ensures you meet Singapore's regulatory requirements—road tax, COE, inspections, and driver hours. SMEs often underestimate true fleet costs and miss compliance deadlines, leading to fines and operational disruption. It matters when your dashboard shows vehicle X costs 30% more per km than vehicle Y, prompting a replacement decision, or when the system alerts you that a vehicle's inspection is due in 30 days.
